program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Meeting an international partner at the Oncology Network -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally -- Meeting an International Partner
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Oncology Network meeting here at the hospital. My name is Sarah, and I am the strategic consultant for the project. We start at nine o'clock in the main room. Today we talk about our numbers, our plan, and our new partners in Latin America. Many colleagues and partners are here with us today. Please introduce yourself to new people and share your contact. If you need any help, I am at the front desk. Thank you, and have a great meeting.

Hi Fernando, this is Daniel from the research team. I call about the kick-off meeting for the new clinical research. The meeting is on Monday at two o'clock, and it is in English. Our American partners are on the call too. Please bring your notes about the budget and the contracts. It is a short meeting, about thirty minutes. Call me back when you are free. Thank you. Talk soon.
